Will Consumers Return To Restaurants After Learning How To Cook At Home?
summary: Restaurants will reopen their dining halls but the timing remains unclear. In the meantime, consumers can still order restaurant meals for delivery or takeout or buy prepared meals from grocery stores.

headline: Warren Buffett Says There's No Bubble In FANG Stocks, But He's Still Not Buying
summary: Berkshire Hathaway Inc. (NYSE: BRK-A) (NYSE: BRK-B) CEO Warren Buffett is one of the most successful and well-respected investors of all time, but that doesn’t mean he hasn’t made his fair share of investing mistakes.
